codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature requirements: CLI status parsing is backward-compatible with missing backend, status output includes backend when present, status --json includes backend field, and profiles output shows backend prefixes.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, skill guidance, and commit diff for cli-backend-display. The code changes in crates/rookery-cli/src/main.rs satisfy expected behavior for VAL-CLI-001, VAL-CLI-003, and VAL-CLI-004 with no blocking or non-blocking issues found.
